Autofill Pitcher Board Application Non-critical Minor Version

description: Convertible Drawer UI Board Application Version

Convertible Drawer UI Board Application Non-critical Minor Version

name: Water Valve State Machine State
description: The enumerated state of the Water Valve state machine.  Indicates Bypass, Closed, Open, Manual Override, Fault, or actively driving.
comment: Water Valve State Machine State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: POE Water Valve Position/State
description: The enumerated position/state of the Water Valve.
comment: POE Water Valve Position/State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: POE Water Flow Rate
description: Water Flow Rate in GallonsX100/Minute.
comment: POE Water Flow Rate: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Water Usage
description: Aggregate Water Usage Gallons.
comment: Water Usage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Daily Water Usage Update Alert
description: Flag set to indicate it is time to poll for the daily water usage.
comment: Daily Water Usage Update Alert: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Water Filter Expiration Alert
description: Flag set on water filter expiration.
comment: Water Filter Expiration Alert: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Water Filter Status Details
description: Details on water filter used to determine expiration.
comment: Water Filter Status Details: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Water Filter Expiration Limits
description: Limits for Gallons and Days for water filter to expire. Countdown begins here at reset.
comment: Water Filter Expiration Limits: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Water Filter Reset Request
description: Set to trigger water filter reset.
comment: Water Filter Reset Request: Reset/restart button.

name: Requested Water Valve Position
description: Command to move water valve to given state.
comment: Requested Water Valve Position: Binary enum writable switch.

name: Valve Manual Override Status
description: Indicates valve is in manual override state.  Must be cleared before a valve position command accepted.
comment: Valve Manual Override Status: Enum writable select.

name: Continuous Flow Alert
description: Used to indicate a continuous flow status has been detected.
comment: Continuous Flow Alert: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Continuous Flow Time Limits
description: Limits applied to low, medium, and high continuous flow alerts.
comment: Continuous Flow Time Limits: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Low Temperature Alert
description: Alert indicating low temperature condition sensed
comment: Low Temperature Alert: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: System Fault Alert
description: Alert indicating system fault.  Details are bit-mapped.
comment: System Fault Alert: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Daily Water Usage
description: Daily Water Usage in gallons.
comment: Daily Water Usage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Leak Validity Confirmation
description: User feedback indicating that Leak Alert was valid/invalid.  Reset to Inactive by control after time.
comment: Leak Validity Confirmation: Leak/moisture detection binary sensor.

name: Unlock Request
description: Triggers Unlock of Go Box. (resets to 0 after request serviced).
comment: Unlock Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Go Box Mode Request
description: Operational mode (which translates to temperature setpoints)
comment: Go Box Mode Request: Enum writable select.

name: Keypad Pin Number
description: 4-Digit Pin used to unlock Go Box (0001 - 9999)
comment: Keypad Pin Number: Single numeric writable value.

name: Package Zone Status
description: Bit Mapped Package Zones. 1/0 zone occupied/empty
comment: Package Zone Status: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Allow Auto Water Valve Shut Off Request
description: Used to request allowing automatic water valve shut off when an issue is detected.
comment: Allow Auto Water Valve Shut Off Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Allow Auto Water Valve Shut Off Status
description: Used to read if automatic water valve shut off is allowed when an issue is detected.
comment: Allow Auto Water Valve Shut Off Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Home Water Filter Notification
description: Bit Mapped Home Water Filter Alert Notifications

data.name: Supported Notifications.Daily Water Usage Update Alert
Supported Notifications.Low Limit Continuous Flow Alert
Supported Notifications.Medium Limit Continuous Flow Alert
Supported Notifications.High Limit Continuous Flow Alert

comment: Home Water Filter Notification: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Water Filter 1 Status Details
description: Details on water filter 1 used to determine expiration.
comment: Auto-suggested: Water Filter 1 Status Details

name: Water Filter 2 Status Details
description: Details on water filter 2 used to determine expiration.
comment: Auto-suggested: Water Filter 2 Status Details

name: Home Water Filter Platform
description: The platform type for the home water filter.
comment: Auto-suggested: Home Water Filter Platform

name: Home Water Filter 0 Type Information
description: Used to publish home water filter 0 type and mounting location.
comment: Auto-suggested: Home Water Filter 0 Type Information

description: Used to publish home water filter 1 type and mounting location.
comment: Auto-suggested: Home Water Filter 1 Type Information

name: Home Water Filter 2 Type Information
description: Used to publish home water filter 2 type and mounting location.
comment: Auto-suggested: Home Water Filter 2 Type Information

name: Turbo Cool Request
description: Used to request setting turbo cool mode on or off.
comment: Turbo Cool Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Turbo Cool Status
description: Used to respond to turbo cool on off request.
comment: Turbo Cool Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Fresh Food Door 1 Status
description: Used to report whether the fresh food door 1 is open or closed
comment: Fresh Food Door 1 Status: Door open/closed binary sensor.

name: Freezer Door 1 Status
description: Used to report whether the freezer door 1 is open or closed
comment: Freezer Door 1 Status: Door open/closed binary sensor.

name: Turbo Freeze Request
description: Used to request setting turbo freeze mode on or off.
comment: Turbo Freeze Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Turbo Freeze Status
description: Used to respond to turbo freeze on off request.
comment: Turbo Freeze Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Current Flowmeter Ounces Dispensed
description: Ounces of water dispensed during an active dispense while water is being dispensed.
comment: Current Flowmeter Ounces Dispensed: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Last Flowmeter Ounces Dispensed
description: Ounces of water dispensed during the last completed dispense.
comment: Last Flowmeter Ounces Dispensed: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Dimmable Lighting 0 Percent Level Request
description: Request to set the light level for dimmable lights to a value between 0 and 100 percent.
comment: Dimmable Lighting 0 Percent Level Request: Single numeric writable value.

name: Dimmable Lighting 0 Percent Level Setting
description: The response to a light level percentage request for dimmable lights with the actual percentage setting.
comment: Dimmable Lighting 0 Percent Level Setting: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Dimmable Lighting 0 Configuration
description: The actual lights in the unit that will be affected by a percent light level request.
comment: Dimmable Lighting 0 Configuration: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Presence Sensing Enable Request
description: Used to request that presence sensing is enabled or disabled.
comment: Presence Sensing Enable Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Presence Sensing Enable Status
description: Used to respond to presence sensing enable request.
comment: Presence Sensing Enable Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Presence Sensed Activates Recess Light Request
description: Request to enable or disable the dispenser recess light turning on when a presence is sensed.
comment: Presence Sensed Activates Recess Light Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Presence Sensed Activates Recess Light Status
description: Dispenser recess light turns on when a presence is sensed status.
comment: Presence Sensed Activates Recess Light Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Presence Sensed
description: Used to report that a presence is sensed.
comment: Presence Sensed: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Door Alarm Enable Request
description: Used to request setting the door alarm enabled or disabled.
comment: Door Alarm Enable Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Door Alarm Enable Status
description: Used to respond to the door alarm enabled or disabled request.
comment: Door Alarm Enable Status: Door open/closed binary sensor.

name: Night Time Snack Mode Lighting Request
description: Request to enable or disable night time snack mode.
comment: Night Time Snack Mode Lighting Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Night Time Snack Mode Lighting Status
description: Maximum interior light level is reduced at night when enabled status.
comment: Night Time Snack Mode Lighting Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Kitchen Illumination Feature Enable Request
description: Request to enable the kitchen illumination feature.
comment: Kitchen Illumination Feature Enable Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Kitchen Illumination Feature Enable Status
description: Kitchen illumination feature is enabled
comment: Kitchen Illumination Feature Enable Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Door Alarm Timer Timeout Request
description: Used to request the desired time before a door alarm is triggered. Maximum time limits are defined in ERD 125A
comment: Door Alarm Timer Timeout Request: Timer/duration value.

name: Door Alarm Timer Timeout Status
description: Used to read the door alarm timer status after ERD 1258 is written
comment: Door Alarm Timer Timeout Status: Door status sensor with multiple fields.

name: Door Alarm Timer Timeout Range Data
description:
Used to read the desired door alarm timer limits.
Data is used to define limits for ERD 0x1258.

data.name: Door Alarm Timer Maximum Setting in Minutes
Door Alarm Timer Default Setting in Minutes

comment: Door Alarm Timer Timeout Range Data: Timer/duration value.
